<?php
// <auto-generated/>
declare(strict_types=1);

namespace Koine\Downstream\Abstractions;

use Koine\Downstream\ValueObjects\Customer;
use Koine\Upstream\ValueObjects\Customer as UpstreamCustomer;

/** Anti-corruption translator from upstream context Upstream into Downstream. */
interface UpstreamToDownstreamTranslator
{
    public function translateCustomerToCustomer(UpstreamCustomer $source): Customer;
}
